hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys, json, os; d=json.loads(os.environ.get('CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT','{}')); f=d.get('file_path',''); blocked=['.env','Conda-Environment-for-ProtGEN_mn5.yml']; matched=[b for b in blocked if b in f]; print(f'BLOCKED: {f} is protected. Edit manually if intentional.') if matched else None; sys.exit(1 if matched else 0)"
